examples.title: Check Pending Signals
examples.description: Program demonstrates how to use sigpending() to check which signals are pending
examples.explanation: This program demonstrates sigpending() usage: 1) Block SIGUSR1, 2) Generate signal (goes to pending queue), 3) Use sigpending() to verify it's pending, 4) Unblock to deliver.

examples.title: Wait for Specific Signal
examples.description: Demonstrates using sigpending() in a loop to wait for a specific signal to become pending
examples.explanation: Shows how to poll for pending signals using sigpending() in a loop, useful for busy-wait signal detection.

examples.title: Signal Set Operations
examples.description: Complete example showing all sigset_t manipulation functions
examples.explanation: Demonstrates all signal set operations: sigemptyset, sigfillset, sigaddset, sigdelset, and sigismember.
